calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard
Alden J. Knisbacher, Esq. for Petitioner: Lisa Hicks, present as Guardian ad litem for: Michael Hicks, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $400.00
Medical Expenses $368.83
A net balance of $1,231.17 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 18th and Franklin, Oakland, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Orders for signature.

Oct. 25, 2007
Order signed by Comm. Kaplan.
No Order for Deposit submitted.
